title.en: Rules and Reality: Regulatory Bands and Per-Technology Coexistence Behavior
title.zh: 规则与现实：法规频段与各技术的共存表现

blocks.en: Sub-1 GHz radio (the bands below 1000 MHz) is prized for IoT because low frequencies travel far and through walls. But the spectrum is tight, and the exact slices you may use change from country to country. IEEE Std 802.19.3-2021 is a Recommended Practice: it does not invent new radios, it studies how IEEE 802.11 (Wi-Fi) and IEEE 802.15.4 (low-power IoT) devices share these crowded bands. This lesson is the bridge between the rulebook and the field: first the regulations in the United States, Japan, and Europe, then the coexistence tricks each technology already uses, and finally what real-world measurements show actually happens.
blocks.zh: Sub-1 GHz 无线（指 1000 MHz 以下的频段）之所以受物联网青睐，是因为低频信号传播远、穿墙能力强。但这段频谱很紧张，而且你能合法使用的具体频段在各国之间各不相同。IEEE Std 802.19.3-2021 是一份“推荐规程”：它并不发明新的无线电，而是研究 IEEE 802.11（Wi-Fi）与 IEEE 802.15.4（低功耗物联网）设备如何在这些拥挤的频段里共享频谱。本课是规则与现实之间的桥梁：先讲美国、日本、欧洲的法规，再讲各技术已经使用的共存手段，最后看真实测量揭示了什么。

blocks.en: Clause 6 maps the spectrum (6.1 introduction). In the United States (6.2) the FCC's 902-928 MHz band is the only sub-GHz band that supports both Wi-Fi and 802.15.4: under §15.247 you may transmit up to 1 W, but you must use either frequency hopping or digital modulation. 802.15.4g SUN FSK counts as a hopping system (with per-channel duty-cycle limits); 802.11ah counts as digital modulation (minimum 1 MHz channel spacing). Japan (6.3) uses the 920 MHz band, governed by three ARIB standards (T106 RFID readers, T107 RFID, T108 telemetry) and a 'carrier sense' rule where 802.15.4g runs as a short-CS station (128 us sensing). Europe (6.4) follows ETSI EN 300 220-2 with named bands D through Q; 802.11ah, because of its wide channels, is confined to bands K and L (863-868 MHz, 25 mW, low duty cycle).
blocks.zh: 第 6 章勾勒了频谱（6.1 引言）。在美国（6.2），FCC 的 902-928 MHz 频段是唯一同时支持 Wi-Fi 与 802.15.4 的 sub-GHz 频段：依据 §15.247，发射功率最高 1 W，但必须采用跳频或数字调制。802.15.4g 的 SUN FSK 被视为跳频系统（含每信道占空比限制）；802.11ah 被视为数字调制（最小信道间隔 1 MHz）。日本（6.3）使用 920 MHz 频段，由三项 ARIB 标准管理（T106 RFID 读写器、T107 RFID、T108 遥测），并设有“载波侦听（CS）”规则，其中 802.15.4g 作为短 CS 台站运行（侦听 128 us）。欧洲（6.4）遵循 ETSI EN 300 220-2，划分了 D 到 Q 等命名频段；802.11ah 因信道较宽，被限制在 K、L 频段（863-868 MHz，25 mW，低占空比）。

blocks.en: A duty cycle is the fraction of time a device is allowed to transmit. Europe's classic limit is around 1% per band, but newer rules let a 'polite' device that listens first (clear channel assessment, CCA) earn more airtime - and a narrowband hopper can reach roughly 8% by spreading its activity across a 600 kHz band.
blocks.zh: 占空比是指设备被允许发射的时间比例。欧洲传统的限值大约是每个频段 1%，但新规允许先侦听（清晰信道评估，CCA）的“礼貌型”设备获得更多发射时间——窄带跳频设备通过把活动分散到 600 kHz 频段，可达到约 8%。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="10" y="20" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">US / FCC §15.247</text><rect x="10" y="30" width="200" height="24"/><text x="18" y="47" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">902-928 MHz, up to 1 W</text><text x="10" y="85" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">Japan / ARIB (920 MHz)</text><rect x="10" y="95" width="200" height="24"/><text x="18" y="112" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">T106 / T107 / T108, carrier sense</text><text x="10" y="150" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">Europe / ETSI 300 220-2</text><rect x="10" y="160" width="200" height="24"/><text x="18" y="177" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">bands K-L 863-868 MHz, 25 mW</text><text x="250" y="20" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">802.11ah needs wide</text><text x="250" y="36" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">channels (>=1 MHz)</text><path d="M240 42 L300 42"/><text x="250" y="100" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">802.15.4g is narrow</text><text x="250" y="116" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">(200-1200 kHz), hops</text><path d="M240 108 L300 108"/></svg>

caption.en: Three regulatory regimes for sub-1 GHz IoT. The allowed power, band edges, and access rules differ by region, which is why a single coexistence answer cannot be universal.
caption.zh: sub-1 GHz 物联网的三套法规体系。允许的功率、频段边界和接入规则因地区而异，因此不存在放之四海皆准的单一共存方案。

blocks.en: Clause 7 turns to coexistence behavior (7.1). It splits the toolbox in two: active mechanisms, where a transmitter tries to reduce its own impact on others (e.g., CSMA/CA - carrier sense multiple access with collision avoidance, meaning 'listen before you talk'); and passive mechanisms, where a receiver tries to shrug off interference (e.g., forward error correction, FEC, plus frequency hopping). Wi-Fi 802.11ah, 802.15.4g, and 802.15.4w all offer active CSMA/CA; LoRa and Sigfox do not. Nearly every technology has some passive protection.
blocks.zh: 第 7 章转向共存表现（7.1）。它把工具箱分为两类：主动机制——发射机设法减少自己对他人的影响（例如 CSMA/CA，即“先听后说”的载波侦听多址/冲突避免）；被动机制——接收机设法抵御干扰（例如前向纠错 FEC 加跳频）。Wi-Fi 802.11ah、802.15.4g 和 802.15.4w 都提供主动 CSMA/CA；LoRa 和 Sigfox 则没有。几乎每种技术都具备某种被动保护。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Coexistence mechanisms] --> B[Active: reduce my impact]
  A --> C[Passive: resist others]
  B --> B1[802.11ah CSMA/CA + ED CCA]
  B --> B2[802.15.4g CSMA/CA + MPM/CSM]
  B --> B3[802.15.4w CCA]
  C --> C1[FEC + frequency hopping]
  C --> C2[802.15.4w split mode bursts]
  C --> C3[LoRa chirp spreading]
  C --> C4[Sigfox repeat x3]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[共存机制] --> B[主动：减少自身影响]
  A --> C[被动：抵御他人干扰]
  B --> B1[802.11ah CSMA/CA + 能量检测 CCA]
  B --> B2[802.15.4g CSMA/CA + MPM/CSM]
  B --> B3[802.15.4w CCA]
  C --> C1[FEC + 跳频]
  C --> C2[802.15.4w 拆分模式突发]
  C --> C3[LoRa 啁啾扩频]
  C --> C4[Sigfox 重复发送 x3]

blocks.en: The per-technology details (7.2-7.6) show how different the players are. 802.11ah (7.2) uses energy-detection CCA at a -75 dBm/MHz threshold and, if it senses energy, may change channel, beamform, reschedule its RAW/TWT windows, or defer. 802.15.4g (7.3) adds a multi-PHY management (MPM) scheme with a common signaling mode (CSM) so coordinators using different PHYs can find each other via enhanced beacons. 802.15.4w (7.4) is built for very long range at very low receive levels (around -140 dBm), so it leans on a 'split mode' that FEC-encodes a frame and scatters it across at least 12 short bursts - only a fraction need survive. LoRa (7.5) and Sigfox (7.6) skip active listening entirely: LoRa relies on its wideband chirp spreading, and Sigfox simply sends each message three times on different channels.
blocks.zh: 各技术的细节（7.2-7.6）展现了参与者之间的巨大差异。802.11ah（7.2）以 -75 dBm/MHz 阈值进行能量检测 CCA，一旦侦测到能量，可以换信道、波束赋形、重排其 RAW/TWT 窗口，或推迟发送。802.15.4g（7.3）增加了多 PHY 管理（MPM）方案及公共信令模式（CSM），使采用不同 PHY 的协调器能通过增强信标互相发现。802.15.4w（7.4）为极远距离、极低接收电平（约 -140 dBm）而设计，因此依赖“拆分模式”：将一帧做 FEC 编码后散布到至少 12 个短突发中——只需其中一部分存活即可恢复。LoRa（7.5）和 Sigfox（7.6）完全跳过主动侦听：LoRa 依靠其宽带啁啾扩频，Sigfox 则在不同信道上把每条消息发送三次。

summary.en: Coverage map: noise measurements (7.7) and the 802.11ah vs 802.15.4w result (7.9)

blocks.en: Why measure? Because regulations and mechanisms only predict; the air tells the truth. 7.7.1 (introduction) notes that besides Wi-Fi and 802.15.4, RFID, LoRa, Sigfox, mobile out-of-band emissions, and even machinery add noise. 7.7.2 (920 MHz Japan): real-time spectrum captures at railway stations, a stadium, and an exhibition center found trains emitting broadband noise (worse with doors open), loudspeakers and wireless power transfer as strong noise sources, RFID at many frequencies, and cellular leakage - all able to hurt 802.11ah and 802.15.4g. 7.7.3 (868 MHz Europe): LPWAN base stations near Nuremberg digitized the whole 863-870 MHz SRD band; the 802.11ah bands K and L carry near-constant UHF RFID carriers (up to 2 W ERP vs Wi-Fi's 25 mW), the 'high-power' band O is congested with LoRa/Sigfox downlink, and bands M/N are busy with short bursts. 7.9 (802.11ah vs 802.15.4w): because 802.15.4w receives at about -140 dBm but 802.11ah only detects energy down to -75 dBm, 802.11ah is effectively a hidden node - listen-before-talk fails. Simulations show interference only when the interferer is very close (FER near 100% for an 802.11ah victim with an 802.15.4w interferer within 5 m, or an 802.15.4w victim with an 802.11ah interferer within 1 m), and it worsens as nodes multiply.
blocks.zh: 为何要测量？因为法规与机制只能预测，空中信道才说真话。7.7.1（引言）指出，除 Wi-Fi 与 802.15.4 外，RFID、LoRa、Sigfox、移动网络带外辐射，乃至机械设备都会增加噪声。7.7.2（日本 920 MHz）：在火车站、体育场、展览中心的实时频谱采集发现，列车发出宽带噪声（开门时更强）、扬声器与无线电力传输是强噪声源、RFID 出现在多个频率、蜂窝泄漏明显——这些都会损害 802.11ah 与 802.15.4g。7.7.3（欧洲 868 MHz）：纽伦堡附近的 LPWAN 基站把整个 863-870 MHz SRD 频段数字化；802.11ah 所在的 K、L 频段充满近乎恒定的 UHF RFID 载波（最高 2 W ERP，而 Wi-Fi 仅 25 mW），“高功率”O 频段被 LoRa/Sigfox 下行拥塞，M/N 频段则被短突发占满。7.9（802.11ah 对 802.15.4w）：由于 802.15.4w 在约 -140 dBm 接收，而 802.11ah 只能侦测到 -75 dBm 的能量，802.11ah 实际上是隐藏节点——先听后说失效。仿真显示只有当干扰源很近时才产生干扰（802.11ah 受害者遇到 5 m 内的 802.15.4w 干扰源、或 802.15.4w 受害者遇到 1 m 内的 802.11ah 干扰源时，误帧率接近 100%），且随节点增多而恶化。

blocks.en: The headline result is the 802.11ah vs 802.15.4g coexistence problem (7.8). In simulations with 50-100 nodes and tiny duty cycles (well under 1%), 7.8.1 (packet delivery) found 802.11ah delivers nearly 100% of its packets regardless, but 802.15.4g's delivery rate falls as 802.11ah traffic rises - and falls sharply when its own traffic doubles. 7.8.2 (latency) found the mirror image: 802.15.4g latency stays bounded (packets are either delivered on time or dropped), while 802.11ah latency grows with traffic and especially with node count - an 802.11ah packet can be delayed almost indefinitely. So 7.8.3 names exactly two goals any fix must meet: maintain 802.15.4g delivery rate, and bound 802.11ah latency.
blocks.zh: 最重要的结果是 802.11ah 与 802.15.4g 的共存问题（7.8）。在 50-100 个节点、占空比极小（远低于 1%）的仿真中，7.8.1（包递交）发现 802.11ah 几乎总能递交近 100% 的包，但 802.15.4g 的递交率随 802.11ah 流量上升而下降，且在自身流量翻倍时急剧下降。7.8.2（时延）发现镜像现象：802.15.4g 时延保持有界（包要么按时递交，要么被丢弃），而 802.11ah 时延随流量、尤其随节点数增长——一个 802.11ah 包可能被几乎无限期地延迟。因此 7.8.3 明确给出任何解决方案必须达到的两个目标：维持 802.15.4g 的递交率，并约束 802.11ah 的时延。

summary.en: Coverage map: why it happens (7.10) and how to fix it (7.11)
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：成因（7.10）与改进方法（7.11）

blocks.en: 7.10 traces the cause to functional differences in CSMA/CA. (a) ED threshold: 802.11ah's threshold (-75 dBm and higher on wider channels) sits above 802.15.4g's (down to -100 dBm), so 802.11ah is deaf to readable 802.15.4g packets and talks over them. (b) CSMA/CA: 802.11ah allows immediate access and uses much smaller, faster backoff with per-slot CCA and backoff suspension; 802.15.4g always backs off, checks CCA only after backoff, and never suspends. (c) channel width: 802.11ah spans MHz (1-16 MHz) so one 802.11ah network can blanket several narrow (200-1200 kHz) 802.15.4g networks at once. (d) data rate: 802.11ah is far faster (150 kb/s to tens of Mb/s) than 802.15.4g (6.25-800 kb/s). (e) bidirectional TXOP (BDT) lets 802.11ah chain uplink+downlink, grabbing more airtime. Net: higher ED threshold, immediate access, small backoff, wide channels, high rate, and BDT all favor 802.11ah - while 802.11ah's per-slot CCA and backoff suspension, and 802.15.4g's slow packets, hurt 802.11ah latency. 7.11 lists improvements: channel switching to non-overlapping bands removes interference entirely; alpha-Fairness-based ED-CCA and Q-Learning-based backoff for 802.11ah; a prediction-based self-transmission-control enhancement; a hybrid CSMA/CA for 802.15.4g (mode-1 standard, mode-2 backoff-free when 802.11ah interference is severe); and tuning network profiles (frame size, network size, backoff parameters). Simulations show each helps.
blocks.zh: 7.10 把成因追溯到 CSMA/CA 的功能差异。(a) ED 阈值：802.11ah 的阈值（-75 dBm，在更宽信道上更高）高于 802.15.4g（低至 -100 dBm），因此 802.11ah 对可读的 802.15.4g 包“听不见”，会直接压过它们。(b) CSMA/CA：802.11ah 允许立即接入，采用更小更快的退避、每时隙 CCA 并带退避挂起；802.15.4g 总是先退避、退避完成后才做 CCA、且从不挂起。(c) 信道宽度：802.11ah 以 MHz 为单位（1-16 MHz），因此一个 802.11ah 网络可同时覆盖多个窄带（200-1200 kHz）802.15.4g 网络。(d) 数据率：802.11ah（150 kb/s 至数十 Mb/s）远快于 802.15.4g（6.25-800 kb/s）。(e) 双向 TXOP（BDT）让 802.11ah 串接上下行，占用更多空口时间。综合：更高 ED 阈值、立即接入、小退避、宽信道、高速率与 BDT 都有利于 802.11ah；而 802.11ah 的每时隙 CCA、退避挂起以及 802.15.4g 的慢速包，又会损害 802.11ah 的时延。7.11 列出改进：切换到不重叠频段可彻底消除干扰；为 802.11ah 提出基于 alpha-公平性的 ED-CCA 与基于 Q 学习的退避；基于预测的自发送控制增强；为 802.15.4g 设计的混合 CSMA/CA（模式 1 为标准，模式 2 在 802.11ah 干扰严重时免退避接入）；以及调整网络配置（帧大小、网络规模、退避参数）。仿真显示每种方法都有改善效果。

blocks.en: Takeaway: the rules say what you may transmit, but the air decides what survives. 802.11ah is loud and fast; 802.15.4g is quiet and patient. In the same band they each win something and lose something - which is exactly why 802.19.3 exists: to recommend coexistence methods, not to crown a winner.
blocks.zh: 要点：规则规定了你“可以”发什么，而空中信道决定了什么能“存活”。802.11ah 又响又快，802.15.4g 又静又有耐心。在同一频段，它们各有胜负——这正是 802.19.3 存在的原因：推荐共存方法，而非评出赢家。

cites.note: Clause 6 spectrum allocation: 6.1 intro, 6.2 United States (FCC 902-928 MHz), 6.3 Japan (ARIB 920 MHz), 6.4 Europe (ETSI EN 300 220-2).
Clause 7.1-7.6: active vs passive coexistence and per-technology mechanisms for 802.11ah, 802.15.4g, 802.15.4w, LoRa, Sigfox.
7.7 noise/interference measurements: 7.7.1 intro, 7.7.2 920 MHz Japan, 7.7.3 868 MHz Europe.
